textByHashes.a06060163fff1d626b7532230fafcb701802df53: Ahhh, hello there my friend. You look like you could do with some assistance.
textByHashes.8ff3977b061c6cac8f122f9f34fecdccb8a92885: Yes, of course... Here, prepare yourselves!
textByHashes.1acf482a719fd08b0797466ba3e2e98ae8bde0a7: There you go... Right, I must be off now. Good luck with your travels.
textByHashes.858333f73987d6a71051121c36fb825494855fa8: Ohhh, hello again... sorry my friend, but I have to get going.
textByHashes.4d9dc6d1ea5fb543fe0934b18f18394e4d583633: Well, this is no good at all! You'll never survive in Morytania, you'll have to go back.
